svg.title: Smart Intrusion Detection System Architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture from camera input through AI processing to alerts and voice output

g.text: Night mode · motion ROI crop · frame buffer queue

svg.text: Phase 1: Laptop + webcam + OpenCV + YOLOv8 + virtual line
Phase 2: Face recognition + clothing color + voice alert
Phase 3: Telegram alerts + offline LLM (Ollama) + SQLite logging
